scope: Persist multi-tracker session-signaled auth state across process death — closes the recurring 'archive.org user force-quits, lands on Authorization required again' bug.
constitutional_anchor: Sixth Law clauses 1-6 + Seventh Law clauses 1-6 + clause 6.G + clause 6.J + plan/2026-05-04-pending-completion-plan.md Phase 1.1

tasks_completed.subject: Add getSignaledAuthState / saveSignaledAuthState / clearSignaledAuthState to PreferencesStorage interface
Implement in PreferencesStorageImpl using a separate signaled_auth.xml SharedPreferences file
tasks_completed.status: DONE — keyspace separation matches Anti-Bluff Pact's Third Law (production keeps account vs signaled-auth distinct so a bug in one cannot leak into the other)

tasks_completed.subject: AuthServiceImpl.getAuthState reads persisted state when sessionSignaledState is null (cold-start path)
TestAuthService fake updated with persistence-equivalent in-memory map (Anti-Bluff Pact Third Law)

falsifiability_rehearsals_recorded.mutation: in AuthServiceImpl.getAuthState(), replace `preferencesStorage.getSignaledAuthState()?.let { signaled -> ... }` with `null?.let { signaled: SignaledAuthState -> ... }` (effectively skip the cold-start signal restoration)
falsifiability_rehearsals_recorded.observed_failure: AssertionError at AuthServiceImplPersistenceTest.kt:85 — expected `Authorized(name=archive.org user, avatarUrl=http://example.test/a.png)` but got `Unauthorized` (cold-start observer never saw the persisted signal). Also caused `signaledAuthState_takes_precedence_over_legacy_account_when_both_exist` at line 127 to fail because the cold-start path now falls through to the legacy account.

falsifiability_rehearsals_recorded.mutation: in TestAuthService.signalAuthorized, drop the line `persistedSignaledState = newState` (write only authState.value)
falsifiability_rehearsals_recorded.observed_failure: AssertionError — expected Authorized but got Unauthorized after simulateProcessRestart; the fake had silently diverged from production where PreferencesStorageImpl.saveSignaledAuthState would still be called. 3 tests failed (signalAuthorized writes to BOTH..., logout_clears_persisted_signal_and_subsequent_restart..., simulateProcessRestart_after_signalAuthorized...).

anti_bluff_posture.sixth_law_clause_1: PASS — AuthServiceImplPersistenceTest exercises the production AuthServiceImpl with a behaviorally-equivalent fake at the persistence boundary. No mocking of the SUT.
anti_bluff_posture.sixth_law_clause_2: PASS — both rehearsals above performed and recorded; the tests fail with clear assertion messages when the production code path is broken.
anti_bluff_posture.sixth_law_clause_3: PASS — primary assertions are on user-visible state: (a) AuthState.Authorized emitted into the observable consumed by Search/Forum/Topic screens, (b) SignaledAuthState persisted to disk (consumed on cold-start). Mock-interaction-count assertions are absent.
anti_bluff_posture.sixth_law_clause_4: PARTIAL — Challenge00CrashSurvivalTest is the Compose UI Challenge gate; honest shallow coverage owed deep-coverage upgrade once UiAutomator-shell harness is in place.
anti_bluff_posture.sixth_law_clause_5: DEFERRED — operator real-device attestation owed at the next matrix run.

anti_bluff_posture.seventh_law_clause_4_forbidden_patterns: PASS — neither test mocks the SUT; no verify-only assertions; no @Ignore; no compilation-only tests; no BUILD-SUCCESSFUL-only gates.
